5625.one_line_summary: Extension adding decentralized storage metadata to ERC-721/1155 NFT tokens.
5625.notes: Provides optional dStorage JSON schema property for NFT metadata, compatible with existing standards without interface changes.

5630.one_line_summary: Encryption/decryption interface using Ethereum keys and secp256k1 curve via RPC methods.
5630.notes: Proposes eth_getEncryptionPublicKey and eth_performECDH RPC methods for direct-to-address encryption; includes contract encryption support via encryptTo method similar to EIP-1271.

5633.one_line_summary: ERC-1155 extension for composable soulbound tokens preventing transfer.
5633.notes: Adds isSoulbound per-token-ID property to ERC-1155; tokens marked soulbound cannot transfer but can mint/burn.

5635.one_line_summary: Oracle for registering and retrieving NFT licensing agreements for derivative works.
5635.notes: Defines dNFT (derivative NFT) licensing registry supporting exclusive/non-exclusive agreements with royalty tracking; compatible with ERC-2981.

5639.one_line_summary: Delegation registry allowing vault wallets to grant asset control to delegate wallets.
5639.notes: Enables wallet/contract/token-level delegation for safer authentication without sharing signing keys; supports read-only access patterns.

5643.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for subscription NFTs with expiration and renewal functionality.
5643.notes: Adds subscription lifecycle methods (renew, cancel, expiresAt, isRenewable) for time-limited NFT memberships/passes.

5646.one_line_summary: Interface for unambiguous identification of mutable token state via fingerprint.
5646.notes: Provides deterministic state fingerprint without requiring knowledge of implementation details; enables protocol support for mutable tokens.

5679.one_line_summary: Consistent minting and burning interface extension for ERC-20/721/1155 tokens.
5679.notes: Standardizes mint/burn methods across token types with consistent event emission and supply tracking.

5700.one_line_summary: Interface for binding fungible and non-fungible tokens to NFTs for bundled transfers.
5700.notes: Enables N:1 token-to-NFT bundling; tokens transfer with bound NFTs until owner unbinds them; supports ERC-721 and ERC-1155.

5719.one_line_summary: Non-interactive replacement of stale smart contract wallet signatures via off-chain URI.
5719.notes: Allows wallets to expose getAlternativeSignature URI for clients to refresh invalid signatures due to configuration changes.

5725.one_line_summary: ERC-721 standard for vesting NFTs releasing underlying tokens over time.
5725.notes: Enables transferable liquid vesting contracts with configurable vesting curves; replaces traditional SAFT with on-chain semi-liquid assets.

5727.one_line_summary: Semi-fungible soulbound token interface for non-transferable identity/credential tokens.
5727.notes: Combines fungible/non-fungible token storage in slots; includes governance, delegation, expiration, and recovery extensions.

5732.one_line_summary: General commit interface for commit-reveal schemes without standardized reveal.
5732.notes: Provides IERC_COMMIT_CORE and IERC_COMMIT_GENERAL for privacy-preserving interactions; compatible with EIP-1271 signatures.

5744.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling tokens to become fungible after maturity period.
5744.notes: Tokens remain non-fungible until maturity; adds balanceOfMatured and getMints methods for tracking vesting/deposit-locked receipt tokens.

5750.one_line_summary: Standardizes using final bytes parameter for extensible method behavior across ERCs.
5750.notes: Enables backward-compatible extensibility for existing methods via unstructured data parameter; multiple existing ERCs already partially compliant.
